pi_items.source: O*NET and SOC code lookups for 11-3121.00
O*NET and SOC major group mappings for 11-3121.00 (Management Occupations vs Business and Financial Operations Occupations)
Analysis of the verifier script and task instructions which explicitly require these 5 steps to pass.

privileged_info_summary: The task instructions and required data are completely synthetically generated via the setup shell script. It requires creating 3 users (maria_chen, david_okonkwo, sarah_patel), 3 routines, 1 measurement category ('BMI'), and 1 nutrition plan based on a generated briefing document. The SOC code 11-3121.00 corresponds to Human Resources Managers under the Management job family (11-0000), contradicting the metadata's claim of Business and Financial Operations.
